case_title: LEE, CHONG MOON VS TURNBAUGH, JEFF. MR. LEHMAN BROTHERS INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAILING TO LEHMAN BROTHERS, INC. RETURNED SIGNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,200.00 FILED BY LEE, CHONG MOON AS TO DEFENDANT TURNBAUGH, JEFF. MR. LEHMAN BROTHERS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, CHONG MOON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TURNBAUGH, JEFF. MR. LEHMAN BROTHERS INC. $3,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $27.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,227.50, MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION DENIED. NOT TIMELY. DEFT'S APPEARANCE WAIVES ARBITRATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
